# uptimekuma_monitor_system_service (Data Source)

Get System Service monitor information by ID or name

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Example: Read System Service monitor by name
data "uptimekuma_monitor_system_service" "example" {
  name = "Nginx Service"
}

# Example: Read System Service monitor by ID
data "uptimekuma_monitor_system_service" "by_id" {
  id = 1
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (Number) Monitor identifier
- `name` (String) Monitor name

### Read-Only

- `system_service_name` (String) Name of the systemd unit (Linux) or SCM service (Windows) being monitored
